params.name: Mind Controller
params.description:
On Sep 29, 2077 AD, the Mind Controller was invented and used in actual combat.
Sirius alien warships invaded Earth. They used the mind controller to set up a pervasive Mind Control network, easily controlling most of the minds of living things on Earth. When the leader of the Sirius Alliance presses the psychic bag's button, all its networks will be activated, controlling and destroying intelligent life. [3 Laws of Mind Control] Mind Control: Provides Mind Control abilities. Mindless: Immune …
